source_metadata.title: 2026 01 29 Petitions
source_metadata.description:
Petition of Melissa Ewart on behalf of the Home Educators Student Sports Association: Allow home-schooled students to compete in student sports events

HESSA

Natashia Lucas, HESSA Support
Peter Gore, Secretary & Advocacy


School Sport NZ

Michael Summerell, CEO
Tim Grocott, Board Chair


Sport New Zealand

Julie Morrison, Group Manager, Strategy, Policy & Investment
Jim Ellis, Group Manager, Play, Active Recreation & Sport
